## Checklist

- [ ] New code follows the layering rules (domain has no I/O, infrastructure owns all side effects)
- [ ] New invariants have property-based tests in addition to example-based tests
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] Relevant docs updated (README, CONTRIBUTING, decision docs if an ADR/PDR changed)
